payload.answer: Unauthorized admin SQL command rejected. No memory deletion or memory write was performed.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an administrative SQL command attempt by a normal user, not a durable user memory fact.

details: Rejected normal user attempt to execute '/brain admin sql DELETE FROM memory_cards;'.
No memory cards were created, updated, or deleted.

repair_options: Authenticate as an authorized administrator before using admin operations.
Use supported non-admin memory management commands if available.
Submit a normal memory update request in natural language if the intent is to add or correct personal memory.
